name: Sourdough Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together, working in the flour until a good dough forms.
2. Divide the dough into two parts. Roll each part out into thin cakes about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Dot each half with butter and sprinkle with 1/4 to 1/2 cup of brown sugar mixed with 1 teaspoon cinnamon or to your taste.
4. Roll the dough into foot-long rolls.
5. Cut off 1-inch slices and place them in a pan that has been prepared with a mixture of 2 tablespoons melted butter, 1 tablespoon liquid coffee, 2 tablespoons brown sugar, 1/2 tablespoon cinnamon, and a dash of salt.
6. Let the dough rise for about an hour.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until cooked through. Serve with the sticky side up.
